title: 这条prompt详细描述了模特的装扮、姿态、背景等元素，适合用于高端时尚杂志或广告拍摄，特别适用于展示具有都市时尚感的品牌形象。
image_alt: 这条prompt详细描述了模特的装扮、姿态、背景等元素，适合用于高端时尚杂志或广告拍摄，特别适用于展示具有都市时尚感的品牌形象。
prompt_original: Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic Korean street-fashion editorial portrait of a stylish young woman posing outdoors beside a bold orange wall under bright natural sunlight. She is wearing an oversized pastel mint green blazer with structured tailoring, matching high-waisted wide-leg trousers, and a fitted dark brown cropped tube top. Add luxury silver accessories including statement earrings, layered necklaces, rings, and a decorative chain detail attached to the blazer. She has long sleek straight dark brown hair, flawless porcelain skin, soft glam makeup with nude matte lips, sharp brows, and a confident elegant expression. Relaxed fashion pose with one hand against the wall, modern chic attitude. Background features clear blue sky, soft urban scenery, cinematic sunlight shadows, and vibrant color contrast between the orange wall and mint outfit. High-fashion editorial photography, Vogue Korea inspired, luxury street style aesthetic, ultra-detailed fabric textures, realistic skin detail, sharp focus, soft depth of field, premium color grading, photorealistic, 85mm lens, 8k. Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, distorted face, extra fingers, bad hands, oversaturated colors, messy hair, duplicate accessories, cartoon, anime, watermark, logo, text, noisy image, low resolution, unrealistic skin, poorly drawn features. 1744x2336
prompt_zh: 根据提供的参考图像，创建一个超现实的韩国街头时尚编辑肖像，描绘一位时尚年轻女性在户外明亮自然光下，站在一面大胆的橙色墙旁边摆姿势。她穿着一件宽松的薄荷绿色西装外套，搭配结构剪裁、高腰宽腿裤和一件紧身深棕色短款露脐上衣。添加奢华银色配饰，包括夸张耳环、叠层项链、戒指以及装饰链细节连接到西装外套上。她有长长的直黑发，无瑕的瓷白皮肤，柔和的妆容，裸色哑光唇彩，锐利的眉毛，自信优雅的表情。轻松的时尚姿势，一只手靠在墙上，现代时髦的态度。背景是晴朗的蓝天，柔和的城市景色，电影般的阳光阴影，以及橙色墙壁与薄荷色服装之间的鲜明色彩对比。高端时尚编辑摄影，受Vogue Korea启发，奢华街头风格美学，超细致的面料纹理，真实的皮肤细节，清晰的焦点，柔和的景深，高级的色彩分级，照片级真实感，85mm镜头，8k分辨率。负面提示：低质量，模糊，不良解剖，扭曲的脸，多余的手指，不良的手部，过度饱和的颜色，凌乱的头发，重复的配饰，卡通，动漫，水印，标志，文字，噪点图像，低分辨率，不真实的皮肤，绘制不佳的特征。1744x2336
